zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu是Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu和Adila d’Amiens的女兒，於1064年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆沙吉利吉。她於1087年9月9日之前與Robert II de Bellême結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1103年在法國皮卡迪享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu是Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu和Adila d’Amiens的女儿，于1064年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆沙吉利吉。她于1087年9月9日之前与Robert II de Bellême结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1103年在法国皮卡迪享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu was born in 1064, in Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, France as the daughter of Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu and Adila d’Amiens. She married Robert II de Bellême before 9 September 1087. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1103, in Picardie, France, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu est née en 1064, à Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, France, fille de Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu et Adila d’Amiens. Elle a épousé Robert II de Bellême avant 9 septembre 1087. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1103, à Picardie, France, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu wurde 1064 in Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu und Adila d’Amiens geboren. Sie hat vor 9. September 1087 Robert II de Bellême geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1103 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu è nata il nel 1064 nel Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, Francia come figlia di Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu e Adila d’Amiens. Lei sposato Robert II de Bellême prima del 9 settembre 1087. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1103, nel Picardie, Francia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieuは1064年にフランスピカーディソンメサイント-リクイエルでGuy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et PonthieuとAdila d’Amiensの娘として生まれた。1087年9月9日以前にRobert II de Bellêmeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1103年にフランスピカーディで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu(은)는 1064년 프랑스 피카디 솜 세인트-리키어에서 Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu(와)과 Adila d’Amiens의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1087년 9월 9일 이전 Robert II de Bellême(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1103년 프랑스 피카디에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu nasceu em 1064, em Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, França filha de Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu e Adila d’Amiens. Ela casou-se com Robert II de Bellême antes 9 de setembro de 1087. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1103, em Picardie, França, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu родилась в 1064 г. в местности сеинт-рикуиир, сомм, пикарди, Франция. Её родителей звали Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu и Adila d’Amiens. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert II de Bellême перед 9 сентябрь 1087 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1103 г. в местности пикарди, Франция в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes de Ponthieu nació en 1064, en Saint-Riquier, Somme, Picardie, Francia como hija de Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu y Adila d’Amiens. Se casó con Robert II de Bellême antes de 9 de septiembre de 1087. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1103, en Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 39 años.
